nasb.text: Moreover, the Lord your God will send the hornet against them, until those who are left and hide themselves from you perish.

esv.text: Moreover, the Lord your God will send hornets among them, until those who are left and hide themselves from you are destroyed.

cnv.text: 耶和華你的　神還要打發大黃蜂飛到他們中間，直到那些殘存躲藏起來的人，都從你面前消滅為止。

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华还要派黄蜂去攻击他们，直到躲藏起来的残存者也全部灭亡。
